'''Uncooked Rice in a Bowl''' is the item used to make [[Rice Bowl]].

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Uncooked rice bowl.png
| id = uncooked_rice_bowl
| type = Farming
| Subtype = Rice
| stackable = 64
| Description = In the furnace it goes!
}}

==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|Bowl 
+ [[Uncooked Rice]]
|[[File:Uncooked rice bowl crafting.png|484x484px]]
|}
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
